Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his son, Logan visit the beautiful country of New Zealand. From visiting Vineyards and sampling wine, to helicopter hunts for Himalayan Tahr, this episode is everything that is a hunters dream. As well as harvesting the wild game New Zealand has to offer Andy also learns about the importance of the conservation efforts that hunting has in this country from locals in which he spends time with.
Video.title: Wildbound - "New Zealand"

Video.summary: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship brings together the nation’s top canine athletes and handlers in Shreveport-Bossier City, Louisiana. In Part 1 of the Amateur Division, teams face off in challenging Retriever Trials alongside high-energy SRS Super Dock competition. Precision, power, and teamwork are put to the test as the road to the Crown begins.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 1"

Video.summary: It’s still opening week of bow season in Oklahoma and the crew has three tags left to fill.
Video.title: "Tagged Out At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: The boys are on the Raven in Missouri trying to plant 50 acres of Big Tine food plots in 5 days before heading out west to kick off the hunting season.
Video.title: "50 Acres In 5 Days"

Video.summary: The crew is all at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma kicking of the 2024 Rifle season.
Video.title: "Rifle Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alabama"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade ends the saga with a deer he has watched for a few years, Pope. On a previous episode you saw Slade put in all of the work with feeder and food plot strategy to make the stars align. Make sure you watch that episode as well to see the behind the scenes work it took to bring Pope to 25 yards.
Video.title: "Pope"

Video.summary: This week, we reflect on a tragic and sad memory in our lives as we remember a dear childhood friend of my son Nick, Nathan Wimsatt. Our families have been close for man years and shared a lot of time together around the soccer field, vacations, fishing trips, and much more. Nathan passed in a tragic car accident at only 18 years on April 29th, 2023. This week his Dad Brian is joining me on Lake Taylorsville where we'll share some memories and celebrate Nathan's life...that ended way to soon!
Video.title: "Life Is A Highway"

Video.summary: Sergeant Major (r) Jamey Caldwell brings some game changing technology along as he joins Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor for some nighttime tarpon fishing at the Long Key Bridge.
Video.title: "Night Vision Tarpon with Jamey Caldwell"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Sam Milazzo to find the elusive daytime Swordfish but run into some great Dolphin fishing on the way.
Video.title: "Dolphin and Swordfish with Sam Milazzo"

Video.summary: "Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor patiently pursue big tarpon from the Everglades to the Middle Keys with fly rod in hand."
Video.title: "Fly Fishing Tour of the Keys"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Richard Black for an exciting adventure in Key Largo, catching a wide variety of fish species on the shallow reef.
Video.title: "Key Largo with Richard Black"

Video.summary: With a free day before Icast. Trenton and Ryan go offshore to try and fill the cooler. Catching a variety of species and hoping to get their hands on a hogfish.
Video.title: “Meat Run”

Video.summary: Trenton and Rex link up with Gehrig Dieter and Anthony Sherman from the Kansas City Chiefs. While filling the boat with crappie they got to learn about the guys and their careers in the NFL.
Video.title: "Crappie Kingdom"

Video.summary: A day of reef fishing in Islamorada turns into a Kingfish and Yellowtail frenzy for Captains Scott and Steve.
Video.title: "Silver And Gold"

Video.summary: It only takes 3 fish to fill the Yeti cooler when Capt. Scott fishes the top with kites for Wahoo and Steve pulls a big Mutton Snapper off the bottom.
Video.title: "Wahoos On Kites"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve take a long run into the Gulf from Stock Island and load the coolers with Cobia and huge Yellowtail Snapper.
Video.title: "Stock Island Grocery Run"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve head west from Key West to battle with big kingfish and end up with plenty of meat for the smoker.
Video.title: "Kingfishing West Of Key West"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve head out early out of Key West, Scott picks away at the Yellowtail Snapper while Steve plays around with Cero Mackerel on fly.
Video.title: "Key West Yellowtails And Cero On Fly"

Image.alt: "Key West Yellowtails And Cero On Fly"
"Key West Yellowtails And Cero On Fly"
"Key West Yellowtails And Cero On Fly"

Video.summary: Captains Scott and Steve catch Bonitas for bait and slow troll them around wrecks for Wahoo and Kingfish.
Video.title: "Trolling Bonitas Out Of Key West"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse Leboeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of Redfish and Tuna.
Video.title: "LA Tuna Pt 1"

Video.summary: On this adventure, we tag along with the Disabled American Veterans of Minnesota "Outdoor Programs" as they travel to Texas for a Hog hunt. We also honor our next Wichita Kansas Scheels Hometown Hero, Will Rivera!
Video.title: "Dav of MN Texas Hog Hunt"

Video.summary: Dan Schmidt and Mark Kayser share insights into the natural behavior of whitetail bucks, particularly during the rutting season, and how scrapes play into their territorial and mating behaviors.
Video.title: "Whitetail Billboards"

Video.summary: Renowned hunter Mark Kayser faces one of his most challenging hunts yet in the sparse woodlands of Nebraska.
Video.title: "Low Density"

Video.summary: Famed Social Media Influencer Leigh McClendon refuses to cave into the pressure of some of his followers who don't support his love of hunting big Whitetail Bucks.
Video.title: "Social Stress"

Video.summary: In this eye-opening episode, Dan Schmidt explores the fascinating science behind a whitetail deer's vision.
Video.title: "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"

Video.summary: Chef Jean-Paul Bourgeois and the crew are back at it for season 3 of duck camp dinners. With a historically dry year in Louisiana, the team dodges marsh fires, hunts alligators, and prepares for the opening day of teal season.
Video.title: "Teal Hole Hustle"

Video.summary: Follow the DCD crew as they head North to hunt with duck call maker Brad Eldrige. Despite tough hunting conditions brought on by a historic drought in Louisiana, the crew is able to knock down a “Tensas Limit” of wood ducks, mallards, honkers, and squirrels.
Video.title: "One bourbon, One Duck, One Deer"

Video.summary: Mike heads to Table Rock Lake to meet up with Trenton and his family. Even battling the tough fishing conditions following a heavy front, there’s never a lack of family time, laughs or friendly competitions with the Southards.
Video.title: “Family Rock”

Video.summary: Trenton is headed to meet up with Andrew Norbye on Lake Guntersville in Alabama. With not a lot of current being pulled, the deep schools weren’t set up to feed. So they went up shallow to fish grass until evening time when the ledge fish really started biting.
Video.title: "Doubled Up"

Video.summary: The boys are in Missouri at the Raven and they are ready to burn some powder and get rifle season kicked off at the Raven.
Video.title: "Rifle Camp At The Raven"

Video.summary: The boys are still at the Raven in Missouri trying to finish planting 50 acres of Big Tine food plots in 5 days. Then Randy heads to the Powder River in Montana and tries to knock down his first buck of the 2025 season.
Video.title: "50 Acres In 5 Days Part 2"

Video.summary: Trenton makes a trip to South Carolina to fish Lake Murray. He meets up with the Rather Outdoors crew to spend time on the water and at the Rather HQ checking out all the gear from Lews and Strike King.
Video.title: "Rather"

Video.summary: The Crew is chasing Tarpon in Tampa Florida with Ryan Harrington. After a few close calls and grinding out the long days, they finally catch up to the Silver King.
Video.title: “No Bananas”

Video.summary: The Southards continue their family tradition on Table Rock Lake. While they’re there, Trenton spends a day with “Mr. Worldwide” James Watson and learns some things from one of the best anglers on the lake.
Video.title: "Table Rock Worldwide"

Video.summary: The Open Division kicks off at the Super Retriever Series Crown Championship, in Shreveport Bossier CIty, Louisiana, featuring the sport’s most seasoned professional handlers and elite canine athletes. Competitors take on intense Retriever Trials and dynamic SRS Super Dock challenges, where experience and execution separate the best from the rest.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 3"

Video.summary: Joe Dickie is an award-winning photographer and filmmaker with a love of upland bird hunting. But he’s never hunted the greatest of all upland game birds: the wild turkey. What better place to be sworn into the Turkey POSSE than the Black Hills of South Dakota? This hunt is full of ups, downs, stubborn gobblers, and a loud-mouthed hen that puts on an unforgettable show.
Video.title: "Black Hills Gobblers"

Video.summary: Turkey hunting in the Deep South is infamous for hard-to-hunt gobblers. The Turkey POSSE heads to Mississippi where they get schooled and can’t scratch out a gobbler to save their lives. They move over to Georgia for opening day and continue to struggle, but eventually a lone gobbler caves and slips into range for the Savage Renegauge. This hunt also brings us on a flashback to much more promising turkey hunting in Minnesota, where the POSSE runs into a pile of northern longbeards.
Video.title: "Turkey Hunting the Deep South - Highs and Lows"

Image.alt: "Turkey Hunting the Deep South - Highs and Lows"
"Turkey Hunting the Deep South - Highs and Lows"
"Turkey Hunting the Deep South - Highs and Lows"

Video.summary: Join Kelly Cooper and her husband Will on her first-ever turkey hunt, where they experience a wild morning of turkey hunting action in Texas. Then, 8-year-old Hudson Lochte sets out to bag his first spring gobbler when a minor mistake costs him. However, Hudson redeems himself when two strutters come in hot to his decoys and his missed shot is quickly forgotten.
Video.title: "Multiple Gobblers Down in Texas! | 3 Turkeys - 7 Beards"

Image.alt: "Multiple Gobblers Down in Texas! | 3 Turkeys - 7 Beards"
"Multiple Gobblers Down in Texas! | 3 Turkeys - 7 Beards"
"Multiple Gobblers Down in Texas! | 3 Turkeys - 7 Beards"

Video.summary: Turkey hunting in Colorado isn't for the timid. Known for its elk and mule deer hunting, Colorado is also home to rugged mountain Merriam's gobblers. From the low-elevation high desert and cottonwood creek bottoms, all the way up to towering canyons and jagged high-country mountains, the state offers some of the most hardcore turkey hunting in the country. As HuntStand's Josh Dahlke was reminded, turkey hunting is turkey hunting ... and you'd better take your shot when you get it.
Video.title: "Backcountry Turkey Hunting in Colorado"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade and his son take on the turkey woods for an afternoon hunt. Although the woods remained quiet, a tom soon snuck out of the woods and on the end of Bentley's barrel! After that Slade was able to help a client of his harvest his first turkey! And boy was it an action packed hunt! Jakes, hens, and tons of gobbles, This hunt is spectacular! Lastly, Slade introduces a property that we have already made a video on, but with just how amazing the land is, we had to include it! Floweree is the epitome of a sportsman's paradise!
Video.title: "Two More Turkeys Down in Mississippi!!!"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade, Ryan and Bearcub take on the midwest! After some tough hunting, the group is able to make a move to get in position on a BIG midwestern gobbler! Bearcub was able to harvest him after working the bird for almost 45 minutes! Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Tour!!"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss is heading offshore into the Gulf of America, eager to feed his offshore fishing obsession.
Video.title: "Offshore Obsession"

Video.summary: He’s the original fishing coach. From the helm of one of the most iconic inshore shows ever made, Captain C.A. Richardson has taught a generation how to fish. This documentary dives into his story. The man, the mission, and the waters that made him who he is.
Video.title: "CA"

Video.summary: The boys are still at the Dirty bird in Oklahoma, trying to get a few more tasks done before heading back to the Raven in Missouri. They also manage to get out and do a little velvet scouting with the Hawk spotting scope.
Video.title: "Hanging Tree Stands And Velvet Scouting"

Video.summary: With two weeks until the opener of Missouri archery season, Randy and Cody are trying to do everything they can to have the Raven prepped for the first bow camp.
Video.title: "Mother Nature Always Win"

Video.summary: It’s the opening week of rifle camp and everyone is ready to go. Big Hoss has a close encounter with a big eight point and Cody finds himself having a little Déjŕ vu when a big buck walks out into the same plot he killed in last year.
Video.title: "Big Hoss"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor fish with Captain Mason Baker, launching from Key Largo, FL to fish for baby Tarpon in the Everglades on their new Cayo Skiff.
Video.title: "Key Largo Baby Tarpon with Captain Mason Baker"

Image.alt: "Key Largo Baby Tarpon with Captain Mason Baker"
"Key Largo Baby Tarpon with Captain Mason Baker"
"Key Largo Baby Tarpon with Captain Mason Baker"
